etymology.description: 𡍬 (phonetic) + 貝 (semantic, "cowry") -> original version 𧸇 -> phonetic 𡍬 reduced to 士 + 四 -> final form 𧶠
etymology.interpretation: This character is a phono-semantic compound where the element 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") denotes the semantic domain related to value or commerce, and the original phonetic component 𡍬 was simplified over time to 士(士) (shì, "scholar") and 四(四) (sì, "four"). The character is often confused with the similar-looking 賣(賣) (mài, "sell"), though they are unrelated etymologically.
